title: qa-strategist agent output
description: Machine-readable summary returned by the qa-strategist agent after a test-coverage gap analysis. Mirrors the Output Format section of agents/qa-strategist.md.

verdict.description: Overall disposition: PROCEED = adequate coverage; PROCEED_WITH_FOLLOWUPS = LOW/MEDIUM gaps only; FIX_REQUIRED = HIGH coverage gap that risks production silent failure; BLOCKED = cannot complete analysis.

report_path.description: Relative path to the human-readable gap report written to .orchestrator/audits/.

blockers.description: Free-text blocker descriptions; empty array when verdict is not BLOCKED.
